LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ATTYS' FEES, OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY, MARY BEIHL.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF MARY BEIHL'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED (PRINCIPAL- $81,560.03). NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR#: 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-04-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEIHL, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALL-TELL LLC $83,425.03 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $83,425.03, SEE SCANNED DOC
